a:r.a:t: Lead quality signals exist but are not built into marketers’ daily workflow or incentives
Marketing teams are pushed to drive tour volume, but sales success depends on the quality of those leads, leading to constant Volume vs quality tension

Marketing does not have a clear view of which leads turn into real sales opportunities & cannot see which campaigns and leads actually convert into tours and sales. i.e. Limited visibility into downstream conversion
call into the call center or engage digitally
(Tourist shops, online pop-ups, events, sports, NASCAR, etc.)
Drives where marketing effort goes analyze which channels perform best
New Buyer Package Sales & Package Activation:
Receives leads from Marketing team, attempts to sell vacation packages (Call-in, Outbound/ cold-call, event marketing + experiential marketing channels )
Activations team contacts open package holders and convinces them to book their travel dates
Influences which customers are likely to show for tours
Assigns tours based on customer profile and rep specialization
Determines which reps receive higher-potential customers
Product education, recommendations and pricing to customers
Non-buyers / no-shows re-enter funnel→ Sent back to Telemarketing
Converts arriving guests and walk-ins into tours
Drives final tour volume entering Sales
HGV Sales, Telemarketing & Marketing Process Flows
